titleStmt.title: SII 9.262: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 262. (A.R. No. 8 of 1917.) ON A STONE SUPPORTING THE BEAM AT THE ENTRANCE INTO THE RANGANATHASVAMI TEMPLE AT KORREVU, MADAKSIRA TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and not dated. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva and mentions his feudatory Bammadēva-Chōḷamahārāja as ruling over Gōvindavāḍi. The latter is stated to have made a gift of some taxes for a perpetual lamp of the god Kammaṭēśvara. On palaeographic grounds this may be relegated to the reign of Jagadēkamalla II.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirā
ja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷa
tiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmatu kalyāṇada ne
levīḍinoḷu śrīmajagadēkamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamā
caṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire tatpāda
padmōpajīvi svasti samadhigatapañcamahāśa
bda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaranoṟeyūre
puravarādhīśvaraṁ kāsyapagōtraṁ
kṣatriyapavitraṁ roddadagō
vaṁ khaḷgasahadēva nigaḷaṁkamallaṁ bhīta
raṁkollaṁ harapādārādhakaṁ parabaḷasā
dhakaṁ śrīmaddavīranoṇaṁba nāḷiṁmu
nniṟiva bammadēvacōḷamaha
rājaru gōviṁdavāḍiyaṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire Aśēṣakottaḷi
yumirddu ka(ṁ)mmaṭēsvaradēvara naṁ
dādīvigege biṭṭa datti bēḍigeya
kammaṭadalu daḷake vīsa Oṁdu
biḍigamaṭadalu tiṁgaḷiṁge hāga Oṁdu
I dhar(ṁ)mava pratipālisidaṁ gaṁgeya ta
ḍiyalu brammaṇage kapileya dā
na māḍida phala .
Digital edition of SII 9.262 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
